generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance CranePositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures real-time position coordinates (x,y,z) of the gantry crane puck/container using high-precision encoders or IMU sensors for dynamic motion tracking."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CranePositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneVelocitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Tracks velocity metrics (linear/angular) of the crane's moving components through differential position measurements at high sampling rates (10-100Hz)."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneVelocityDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneAccelerationSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Monitors acceleration forces acting on the crane structure and load using accelerometers, critical for dynamic stability analysis during swinging trajectories."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneAccelerationDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneLoadSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures real-time load status and weight distribution of transported containers/pucks using load cells or strain gauges integrated with the crane's lifting mechanism."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneLoadDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneActuatorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Records current draw from actuators (motors) to infer power consumption and detect potential faults in the mechanical system through current monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneActuatorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance CranePositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CranePositionSensor
]

instance CraneVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneVelocitySensor
]

instance CraneAccelerationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneAccelerationSensor
]

instance CraneLoadDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneLoadSensor
]

instance CraneActuatorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneActuatorCurrentSensor
]

instance SerialControllerInterface : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Low-level binary/serial communication protocol interface between physical crane controller and Python-based interface container, transmitting raw sensor data packets."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CranePositionDataTransmitted, CraneVelocityDataTransmitted, CraneAccelerationDataTransmitted, CraneLoadDataTransmitted, CraneActuatorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance CraneKinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D kinematic model of the gantry crane structure derived from CAD data, implementing forward/inverse kinematics for trajectory planning and motion simulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonCraneInterfaceEnabler, TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance CraneDynamicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Physics-based dynamic model simulating crane behavior under load conditions, incorporating mass properties, friction coefficients, and structural damping."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationServiceEnabler
]

instance CraneTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured time-series dataset containing position, velocity, acceleration, load, and actuator current measurements at 10-100Hz sampling frequency."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CranePositionDataTransmitted, CraneVelocityDataTransmitted, CraneAccelerationDataTransmitted, CraneLoadDataTransmitted, CraneActuatorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance PreprocessedSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Cleaned and normalized sensor data stream after timestamp synchronization, unit conversion, and basic outlier filtering applied by the Logging Application container."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SerialControllerInterface
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler, ContinuousValidationServiceEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance PythonCraneInterfaceEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based containerized interface bridging physical crane controller with digital twin components, implementing protocol translation from proprietary binary/serial to structured data formats."
    DTDFVocab:enables LoggingApplicationServiceEnabler, ContinuousValidationServiceEnabler
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB time-series database optimized for high-frequency sensor data storage (10-100Hz), enabling efficient querying of historical and real-time operational metrics."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService, FaultDetectionService, HistoricalDataAnalysisService
]

instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT message broker facilitating asynchronous communication between Logging Application and other digital twin services with low-latency publish/subscribe protocol."
    DTDFVocab:enables LoggingApplicationServiceEnabler, SimulationServiceEnabler, ContinuousValidationServiceEnabler
]

instance LoggingApplicationServiceEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerized logging application performing data ingestion, preprocessing, and initial validation of incoming sensor streams before database storage."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataIngestionService, DataPreprocessingService
]

instance SimulationServiceEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Computational engine executing kinematic/dynamic simulations of crane behavior using CAD-derived models for predictive analysis and validation."
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance ContinuousValidationServiceEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Validation framework comparing real-time sensor data with simulated model outputs to detect synchronization errors, sensor drift, or model inaccuracies."
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataIngestionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous data acquisition service ingesting high-frequency sensor streams (10-100Hz) from the physical crane via proprietary controller interfaces."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataIngestionInsight
]

instance DataPreprocessingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data preprocessing service performing timestamp normalization, unit conversion, and basic outlier detection on incoming sensor measurements."
    DTDFVocab:provides PreprocessedDataInsight
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time control optimization service implementing trajectory planning algorithms to minimize energy consumption while maintaining crane stability and precision."
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlOptimizationInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive dashboard service providing real-time visualization of crane kinematic states, historical performance metrics, and predictive analytics outputs via Grafana."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated validation service continuously comparing physical sensor data with digital twin model outputs to detect synchronization errors and model inaccuracies."
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Anomaly detection service employing machine learning algorithms to identify potential actuator failures, structural stress, or sensor malfunctions in real-time."
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Post-processing service analyzing historical time-series data to identify performance trends, energy consumption patterns, and operational benchmarks."
    DTDFVocab:provides AnalysisInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance DataIngestionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time confirmation of successful data acquisition from all physical sensors with timestamp synchronization and initial data quality checks."
]

instance PreprocessedDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation of data preprocessing steps including timestamp normalization, unit conversion, and outlier removal before database storage."
]

instance ControlOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized control parameters for crane motion including trajectory paths, velocity profiles, and energy consumption metrics calculated in real-time."
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 2D/3D visualizations of crane kinematic states, load trajectories, and historical performance metrics accessible via web-based dashboards."
]

instance ValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous synchronization metrics comparing physical sensor data with digital twin model outputs, including error thresholds and drift detection alerts."
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time anomaly detection results identifying potential hardware failures, structural issues, or sensor malfunctions with confidence scores."
]

instance AnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical performance analysis including energy consumption trends, operational cycle statistics, and predictive maintenance recommendations."
]

// C1: Physical System
instance LabScaleGantryCrane : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "Lab-scale cyber-physical system demonstrating digital twin principles with modular mechanical structure, kinematic joints, and load-bearing mechanisms for research/education."
    base:contains CraneMechanicalStructure, CraneController, CraneSensors
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment LabEnvironment
]

instance CraneMechanicalStructure : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Modular gantry crane assembly including base frame, moving carriage, and lifting mechanism with kinematic joints for precise motion control."
    base:isContainedIn LabScaleGantryCrane
]

instance CraneController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Dedicated embedded controller interfacing with actuators and sensors using proprietary low-level communication protocols for real-time operation."
    base:isContainedIn LabScaleGantryCrane
]

instance CraneSensors : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Sensor suite including position, velocity, acceleration, load, and actuator current sensors mounted on critical components for real-time feedback."
    base:isContainedIn LabScaleGantryCrane
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance CraneActuatorSystem : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromechanical actuator system including servo motors and stepper mechanisms for precise positioning and load manipulation, controlled via embedded controller."
]

// C12: Virtual System
instance DigitalTwinGantryCrane : DTDFVocab:VirtualSystem [
    base:desc "Digital twin representation of the lab-scale gantry crane implementing kinematic/dynamic models, real-time validation, and optimization services for research/education."
    base:contains CraneKinematicModel, CraneDynamicModel, TimescaleDBEnabler, SimulationServiceEnabler
]

// C13: Environment
instance LabEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Controlled laboratory environment housing the physical gantry crane system with dedicated power supply, network infrastructure, and safety measures."
    base:contains LabScaleGantryCrane, DigitalTwinGantryCrane
]

// C14: Data Flow Connections
instance DataFlowFromSensorsToInterface : DTDFVocab:DataFlow [
    base:desc "High-frequency (10-100Hz) data transmission from physical sensors to Python-based interface container via proprietary serial/USB communication protocol."
    DTDFVocab:from CranePositionSensor, CraneVelocitySensor, CraneAccelerationSensor, CraneLoadSensor, CraneActuatorCurrentSensor
    DTDFVocab:to SerialControllerInterface
]

instance DataFlowFromInterfaceToLogging : DTDFVocab:DataFlow [
    base:desc "Protocol translation and initial data structuring performed by Python interface container before ingestion into logging application."
    DTDFVocab:from SerialControllerInterface
    DTDFVocab:to LoggingApplicationServiceEnabler
]

instance DataFlowFromLoggingToDatabase : DTDFVocab:DataFlow [
    base:desc "Structured time-series data storage in TimescaleDB after preprocessing and validation by logging application container."
    DTDFVocab:from LoggingApplicationServiceEnabler
    DTDFVocab:to TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance DataFlowFromDatabaseToServices : DTDFVocab:DataFlow [
    base:desc "Query-based data retrieval from TimescaleDB for visualization, analysis, and validation services with optimized time-series indexing."
    DTDFVocab:from TimescaleDBEnabler
    DTDFVocab:to DataVisualizationService, HistoricalDataAnalysisService
]

instance DataFlowFromMQTTToServices : DTDFVocab:DataFlow [
    base:desc "Asynchronous message distribution from MQTT broker to simulation and validation services for real-time processing of sensor data streams."

    DTDFVocab:to SimulationServiceEnabler, ContinuousValidationServiceEnabler
]

// C15: Service Connections
instance ServiceConnectionOptimalControl : DTDFVocab:ServiceConnection [
    base:desc "Bidirectional connection enabling optimal control service to send trajectory commands to physical crane while receiving real-time feedback."
    DTDFVocab:from OptimalControlService
    DTDFVocab:to CraneController
]

instance ServiceConnectionValidation : DTDFVocab:ServiceConnection [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service comparing physical sensor data with digital twin model outputs to detect synchronization errors."
    DTDFVocab:from ContinuousValidationService
    DTDFVocab:to CraneSensors
]

// C16: Twinning Relationships
instance PhysicalDigitalSynchronization : DTDFVocab:TwinningRelationship [
    base:desc "Bidirectional synchronization mechanism ensuring real-time alignment between physical crane operations and digital twin model states through continuous validation."
    DTDFVocab:from LabScaleGantryCrane
    DTDFVocab:to DigitalTwinGantryCrane
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "
The **Virtual-to-Physical Interaction** in this system is orchestrated through the **Control Application** container, which generates and executes commands for the physical crane via the **Physical Crane Interface**. Key components include:

- **Command Types**: Optimized trajectories generated by the **Trajectory Generator Service**, designed to eliminate residual swinging motion at the end of movements. Commands likely include **position targets, velocity profiles, and acceleration constraints** for the crane’s actuators.
- **Control Message Formats**: Commands are transmitted as **structured Python objects** (inferred from the Python-based Control Application) to the Physical Crane Interface, which translates them into **controller-specific commands** (e.g., PWM signals, stepper motor pulses).
- **Validation and Authentication**: No explicit mention of authentication mechanisms; validation is implicitly handled by the **Continuous Validation Service**, which compares executed trajectories (physical) with simulated trajectories (digital) using **distance metrics** (e.g., Euclidean or RMS error). If thresholds are breached, alerts are triggered via the **Dashboard**.
- **Feedback Systems**: The system lacks explicit feedback loops from the physical crane to the digital twin for real-time adjustments (e.g., PID control). Instead, **post-execution validation** occurs via the Continuous Validation Service.
- **Conflict Resolution**: Not explicitly addressed; assumed to rely on **synchronized state updates** from the Logging Application and the Control Application’s command queue.
- **Command Execution Confirmation**: No explicit acknowledgment mechanism is described; confirmation is inferred from the **Continuous Validation Service’s** comparison of physical vs. simulated trajectories.
"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The **GreenhouseDT** exemplar employs a **modular architecture** leveraging **InfluxDB** for time-series data storage, **ActiveMQ** for asynchronous message brokering, and **virtual machines** for deployment, facilitating easy dissemination via containerization. The **Air Quality Management** exemplar utilizes **Microsoft Azure tools** for pipeline implementation and integrates **AutomationML-based digital twin models** with a **Raspberry-Pi sensor network**, suggesting a **hybrid cloud-edge orchestration** where sensor data is processed locally before being sent to Azure for simulation, visualization, and prediction. The **Lab Scale Gantry Crane** system is described using the **C4 Model** for architecture visualization, implying a **component-based design** with clear separation of concerns, though no specific orchestration patterns (e.g., microservices, event-driven) are detailed. All exemplars adopt **ad-hoc approaches** rather than commercial frameworks, relying on **containerization/virtualization** for scalability and **single-board computers** (e.g., Raspberry-Pi) for edge deployment. No explicit system-wide coordination mechanisms (e.g., Kubernetes, service meshes) are mentioned."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The provided documents do not explicitly detail lifecycle stages (e.g., design, deployment, operation, retirement) for any of the Digital Twin systems. However, the **GreenhouseDT** exemplar implies a lifecycle involving **behavioral adaptation of both the physical greenhouse and its digital twin**, suggesting iterative refinement through **prerecorded data** in virtual machines and **InfluxDB** for real-time monitoring. The **Air Quality Management** exemplar describes **runtime visualization, simulation, and prediction** as applications, indicating lifecycle phases where the digital twin evolves from a static model to an adaptive system for decision support. The **Lab Scale Gantry Crane** system, while not detailed in lifecycle terms, is described using the **C4 Model** for architecture visualization, implying structured documentation and iterative design. **Lifecycle governance** is not explicitly mentioned, but the use of **GitHub repositories** suggests version-controlled development and deployment. **Transition management** between phases is not documented beyond the adaptive nature of the systems. **Not in Document** for comprehensive lifecycle governance frameworks or formalized transition protocols."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "
The **GreenhouseDT** exemplar emphasizes **behavioral adaptation** of both the physical greenhouse and its digital twin, implying dynamic validation through real-time feedback loops. However, explicit **model fidelity requirements, validation and verification (V&V) methods, uncertainty quantification, or error correction mechanisms** are not detailed in the provided documents.

The **Air Quality Management** exemplar focuses on **Model-Driven digital twin engineering**, suggesting structured approaches to model fidelity and validity. The system provides **runtime visualization, simulation, and prediction** applications, which likely incorporate **validation through comparative analysis** between simulated and real-world data. However, specific **uncertainty sources, error detection mechanisms, or quality assurance processes** are not explicitly described in the documents.

The **lab-scale gantry crane** exemplar does not mention any fidelity or validity considerations in the provided documents, thus leaving this characteristic unspecified for that system.
"
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "
The **Digital Twin’s Technical Connection** infrastructure is not explicitly detailed in the documents, but inferred components include:

- **Communication Protocols**:
  - **MQTT Broker**: Used for **asynchronous inter-service communication** (e.g., between Logging Application, Trajectory Generator Service, and Simulation Service). MQTT topics likely organize data streams (e.g., `/crane/sensor`, `/crane/command`).
  - **Database Integration**: TimescaleDB is queried via **SQL/PostgreSQL APIs** for visualization and analytics.
  - **Physical Interface**: Likely **serial/USB or proprietary protocols** for crane controller communication (unspecified).
- **Network Topology and Architecture**: Not described; assumed to be a **local-area network (LAN)** with the MQTT Broker acting as a central hub. No mention of distributed or cloud-based networking.
- **Bandwidth and Latency Requirements**:
  - **High-bandwidth** for sensor data transmission (implied by continuous logging).
  - **Low-latency** critical for trajectory execution (e.g., <100ms for control loops, though not quantified).
- **Reliability and Redundancy Mechanisms**: Not mentioned; assumed to rely on **TimescaleDB’s replication** and **MQTT’s QoS levels** (if configured).
- **Security Protocols**: None explicitly stated; inferred to use **default MQTT security** (e.g., TLS for broker-client communication if enabled) and **TimescaleDB’s PostgreSQL authentication**.
"
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "
The **Digital Twin’s Hosting and Deployment** infrastructure is described implicitly as **on-premise/edge-based**, tailored for the lab-scale gantry crane system:

- **Hosting Platforms**: Deployed on **local hardware** (no cloud or distributed cloud mentioned). The **MQTT Broker**, **TimescaleDB**, and containerized services (e.g., Trajectory Generator, Simulation) run on a **single or small cluster of machines**.
- **Computational Requirements**:
  - **CPU**: Moderate (sufficient for Python-based services and TimescaleDB operations).
  - **Memory**: Not specified, but likely **<16GB** for the combined workload (Logging, Control, Simulation, and Validation Services).
  - **GPU**: Not required; simulations are likely CPU-bound.
- **Storage Requirements**: **TimescaleDB** requires **persistent storage** for time-series data (scaling with log volume). No explicit sizing mentioned.
- **Scalability Mechanisms**: Not described; assumed to be **vertically scalable** (upgrading hardware) or **horizontally scalable** via container orchestration (e.g., Kubernetes, though not mentioned).
- **Deployment Models Supported**:
  - **Containerized Deployment**: All services (except Physical Crane) are abstracted as **C4 containers** (not Docker containers; likely Python virtual environments or standalone executables).
  - **No mention of DevOps tools** (e.g., CI/CD, Helm charts).
- **Availability/Reliability Assurance**:
  - **High Availability**: Not explicitly ensured; relies on **TimescaleDB’s durability** and **MQTT’s persistence** (if configured).
  - **Fault Tolerance**: No redundancy mechanisms (e.g., failover brokers, replicated databases) are described.
"
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The **GreenhouseDT** exemplar integrates with **InfluxDB** (time-series database) and **ActiveMQ** (message broker) for internal data exchange, but no explicit interoperability standards (e.g., OPC UA, MQTT) or dependencies on external enterprise systems are mentioned. The **Air Quality Management** exemplar leverages **Microsoft Azure** for cloud-based simulation, visualization, and prediction, implying integration with Azure’s **IoT Hub** and **Azure ML** services, though no specific protocols (e.g., MQTT, REST) or interoperability standards are detailed. The **Lab Scale Gantry Crane** system is not described in terms of external integration. Overall, the documents do not provide concrete details on **data exchange protocols**, **interoperability standards**, or **integration patterns** with other Digital Twins or enterprise systems beyond the use of **Raspberry-Pi sensors** and **Azure tools** in specific exemplars."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The provided documents do not explicitly mention compliance with **industry standards** (e.g., ISO/IEC 42010, IEEE P2414) or **certification frameworks** for Digital Twin systems. The **Air Quality Management** exemplar uses **AutomationML** as a modeling standard for the digital twin, which is aligned with **industry interoperability** in construction and engineering domains. **Microsoft Azure tools** imply adherence to Microsoft’s cloud standards, but no formal compliance frameworks (e.g., ISO 27001) are referenced. The **GreenhouseDT** exemplar relies on **InfluxDB** (a time-series database standard) and **ActiveMQ** (JMS-compliant message broker), suggesting adherence to **open-source data and messaging standards**. The **Lab Scale Gantry Crane** system lacks explicit standardization details but follows the **C4 Model** for architecture documentation, which is a **software engineering standard**. **Not in Document** for formal interoperability standards (e.g., OPC UA, ROS 2), certification requirements, or compliance with domain-specific regulations (e.g., IEC 62443 for cyber-physical systems)."
]
